# ⚙️ Backend Technical Story

## 🎯 Objective
Implement the backend logic to support **[feature name]**, providing the necessary APIs, business logic, and database models.

## 🧾 Description
Create or modify backend functionality to allow [describe what this feature enables or changes].

## 🧱 Technical Tasks
- [ ] Create/Update API endpoint: `POST /api/[endpoint]`
- [ ] Define request/response schema (OpenAPI/Swagger).
- [ ] Add validation (e.g., Joi/Zod).
- [ ] Implement business logic in [service or controller].
- [ ] Create/Update database models and migrations.
- [ ] Write unit tests for new functions/services.
- [ ] Ensure performance and security best practices.

## 🔗 Dependencies
- [ ] Database models: [list or link]
- [ ] External APIs or services: [list]
- [ ] Related frontend story: [link to FE issue]

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Unit tests for logic.
- [ ] Integration tests for endpoints.
- [ ] Manual test checklist: [describe expected responses].

## 📘 Documentation
- [ ] Update API documentation (Swagger/Postman).
- [ ] Add code comments and README updates.

## 🚀 Definition of Done
- [ ] All tests (unit + integration) pass.
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved.
- [ ] Deployed to staging and verified by QA.
- [ ] Merged to `main`.
